text: This is a bet on Bitcoin reaching a very high price in a few years. While crypto can be volatile, $115,000 for Bitcoin seems like a significant leap. I'm not sure I'd be comfortable explaining to an auditor why we're making such a large, speculative bet on such a specific, high price point, even if the AI sees some edge. It feels like it could be perceived as trying to capitalize on extreme price movements rather than sound investment.
